jobs.title: Product Sales Specialist - Pet Health
jobs.description: Must Love Dogs!! At Tribe Wellness, we're more than just a tribe – we're a movement. Rooted in courage, empowerment, and integrity, we've pioneered solutions that transform the world's wellness brands into revenue-generating machines. We bridge the gap between brands and revenue by turning our clients’ customers into lifetime supporters, and we do that by turning good salespeople into great salespeople. At Tribe Wellness Sales, we’re on a mission to help pets live longer, healthier lives through supplements that actually deliver. But here’s the catch: too many pet owners grab a product online and then flounder—unsure how to use it or missing the guidance to make it work. That’s where you, our Product Sales Specialist (called a Protocol Review Specialist in our world), make the difference. Without you, pets miss out on better health, owners lose confidence, and our mission stalls. With you? You’re the spark that turns a purchase into a transformation—for pets and their people. What You'll Do: Sell: You’ll sell products and services for our pet client, a company built for pet owners, by pet owners, with over a million happy dogs and growing! As a Maps Evaluator, you will have the opportunity to provide ground truth for your town, city or country. jobs.title: Client Success Manager (US small & medium businesses)
jobs.location: Anywhere in the world (US business hours)
jobs.description: Position: Client Success Manager Location: 100% Remote – Work from Anywhere Schedule: U.S. West Coast Hours, Monday–Friday (Full-Time) Overview Integrated Hire (integratedhire.com) helps small and mid-sized U.S. businesses build high-performing remote teams by connecting them with experienced offshore professionals across administration, finance, customer service, marketing, operations, and more. We’re looking for a Client Success Manager who is highly organized, responsive, and excellent at keeping clients happy. This is not primarily a sales role. The focus is on onboarding, client communication, follow-up, problem solving, and making sure the client experience stays smooth from the moment a client signs through the hiring process and beyond.
